potential_missing.source_sentence: This system needs more manpower to track the records of crimes and it lacks security.
This system provides proper security and reduces the manual work.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall maintain a comprehensive database of all crime activities within the state.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The proposed crime bureau is a database system in which the police keeps the record of criminals who have been arrested, to be arrested, or escaped and the complaints.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall maintain a comprehensive database of all criminal records.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Modern society is characterized by increasing levels of risk posed by internal and external security threats.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall ensure the security of crime reports data from internal and external threats.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall automate the tracking of crime records.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention of automation in the source text. The original text mentions that all work is done on papers, implying a need for digitalization.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall maintain a database of criminal records.
duplicates.requirement_b: The proposed crime record management system can overcome all the limitations of the existing system by maintaining a database through which the entire crime activities in the state can be monitored.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are similar and can be combined into one.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall maintain a comprehensive database of all crime activities within the state.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous. The source text mentions that the proposed crime bureau is a database system, but it does not specify what 'comprehensive' means in this context.
